---
title: 0000 Tangle on Stdin
authors:
  - joe_starr
status: happy
---

## Purpose

Tests the standard in interface works as intended.

## Description

Pass a WPTT to the tool on standard in.

## Inputs

- $\iota [0]$
- $\iota [0\ 0]$
- $\iota [1]$
- $\iota [-1]$
- $\iota ([0][0\ 0])$
- $\iota ([0][-1])$
- $\iota ([0][0])$
- $\iota ([-1][0\ 0])$
- $\iota ([-1][-1])$
- $\iota ([-1][0])$
- $\iota ([0\ 0][0\ 0])$
- $\iota ([0\ 0][-1])$
- $\iota ([0\ 0][0])$
- $\iota ([-3][3\ 0])$
- $\iota ([-3][-2])$
- $\iota ([-3][2\ 0])$
- $\iota ([-2][3\ 0])$
- $\iota ([-2][-2])$
- $\iota ([-2][2\ 0])$
- $\iota ([3\ 0][3\ 0])$
- $\iota ([3\ 0][-2])$
- $\iota ([3\ 0][2\ 0])$
- $\iota (([0][0\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([0][-1]))$
- $\iota (([0][0]))$
- $\iota (([-1][0\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([-1][-1]))$
- $\iota (([-1][0]))$
- $\iota (([0\ 0][0\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([0\ 0][-1]))$
- $\iota (([0\ 0][0]))$
- $\iota (([-3][3\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([-3][-2]))$
- $\iota (([-3][2\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([-2][3\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([-2][-2]))$
- $\iota (([-2][2\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([3\ 0][3\ 0]))$
- $\iota (([3\ 0][-2]))$
- $\iota (([3\ 0][2\ 0]))$

## Expected Output

### $\iota[0]$

```text
0.000000,2.000000,0.000000
1.000000,1.500000,0.000000
2.000000,2.000000,0.000000

0.000000,0.000000,0.000000
1.000000,0.500000,0.000000
2.000000,0.000000,0.000000
```

### $\iota[0\ 0]$

```text
0.000000,2.000000,0.000000
0.500000,1.000000,0.000000
0.000000,0.000000,0.000000

2.000000,2.000000,0.000000
1.500000,1.000000,0.000000
2.000000,0.000000,0.000000
```
